message:
test(mux): add 20 unit tests for MuxNotification, SessionTerminated, terminal_size_to_pty_size

- MuxNotification: debug/clone for all 14 variants
- SessionTerminated: display, debug, error trait for WindowClosed
- terminal_size_to_pty_size: basic conversion and zero-size case
- DEFAULT_WORKSPACE constant value

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
